message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorFontSize 28
  ParticipantFontSize 28
  ArrowFontSize 28
  ArrowThickness 2
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
}

actor user as U
participant "Wrapped" as W
participant "wrapped" as w

U -> W : 1 predict(X)

activate W
W -> W : 2 validate; strip
W -> W : 3 predict(Xt)
W <- w : 4 yt
W -> W : 5 add metadata
W --> U : 6 y
deactivate W

@enduml
